FUNDING

when you need it.

Working capital

SBA (requires p.g)

And many more…

Term loan

Long-term financing,
up to 7 years.

Working capital

Payments that flex with your
sales, forget about fixed interest.

Cash advance

Improve today's cash flow
based on future sales.

Equipment funding

Leverage your equipment to
get favorable loan terms.

SBA (requires p.g)

Government-backed loans
with flexible terms.

  • Asana

    D Danny

    Alan guided us step by step through the…

    we successfully obtained success, and the whole process was wrapped up in just five days. Much appreciated.

  • Asana

    Curtis Jones


    Thank you

    Thank you, Ben sterling & shannon, for all your help and patience. You have been just amazing and beyond expectations. Always so easy to talk to and reach anytime. 100% transparency. 100% cared about their customers.

  • Asana

    Michael Smith

    Great copmany - transformed my skepticism into trust

    Ben, and Alan my funding advisor, handled the situation so fast and really in the best way possible. Looking forward to work together again. Thanks team.

  • Asana

    Ericka B


    Lifesaver

    If you're serious about your business go with NYS. Try to get an approval and see for yourself. Amazing people. Amazing process. Amazing company.

  • Asana

    Conrad Mayer

    The best lender in FL

    The availability, speed, offers.. I don't know how you guys do that, but the risk you took with our company was something I never thought was possible…..

  • Asana

    Emily

    Very supportive and infromative

    Really quick. Best offer between 4 different lenders we checked with. Thanks Benjamin!

  • Asana

    Rob I

    They really care.

    It's not just a slogan, they really took the time to understand my business and didn't sell me any funding before they were sure it can actaully help. 5/5!

  • Asana

    Jaime

    Great Company

    I've tried many different ways to borrow money for my business vefore and none have been as fast and as transparent as NYS. I'm really happy I decided to move forward with them and make the right decision for my business.

  • Asana

    James

    Phenomenal offers

    Phenomenal offers! Shawn was able to get us 5 different funding optoins to choose from. We took $125,000 LOC and a term loan. REALLY good terms.

  • Asana

    Albert Frazier


    Best leder ever!

    I've been working with NYS for 4 years now. We usually take funding 2 to 4 time a year. Ben is one of the best. He makes the process so simple and quick. We get approval under 2 hours and access to the capital under 2 days…

  • Asana

    D Danny

    we successfully obtained success, and the whole process was wrapped up in just five days. Much appreciated.

Legal

Privacy

Terms

*DISCLAIMER: New York Savings serves as a trusted guide on your journey towards business financing.
Our platform is designed to offer invaluable insights, expert advice, and connects you with a range of potential lending options tailored to your unique business needs.

However, while we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, we cannot guarantee the completeness or accuracy of this information due to the dynamic nature of the financial industry.
Therefore, we strongly encourage all our users to conduct their own due diligence and seek independent financial or legal advice before making any financial decisions or commitments. By using our website and our services, you agree to our terms of service and acknowledge that any decisions based on information found on our site are your own responsibility.
Your engagement with New York Savings signifies your understanding and acceptance of these terms.

© New York Savings LLC. 2024
